name: Moissa Knight, the Comet General
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>彗</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>すい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>将</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ワンモア・ザ・ナイト
name_jp_rom: Suisei no Shō - Wanmoa Za Naito
name_jp_tl: Comet Holy General - Onemore the Knight
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
If you Pendulum Summon a monster(s): Place this card on either the top or bottom of the Deck.

[ Monster Effect ] 
When you draw this card: You can reveal it; during your Main Phase this turn, you can conduct 1 Pendulum Summon of a monster(s) from your hand in addition to your Pendulum Summon. (You can only gain this effect once per turn.)
pend_eff: If you Pendulum Summon a monster(s): Place this card on either the top or bottom of the Deck.
mnst_eff: When you draw this card: You can reveal it; during your Main Phase this turn, you can conduct 1 Pendulum Summon of a monster(s) from your hand in addition to your Pendulum Summon. (You can only gain this effect once per turn.)
eff: When you draw this card: You can reveal it; during your Main Phase this turn, you can conduct 1 Pendulum Summon of a monster(s) from your hand in addition to your Pendulum Summon. (You can only gain this effect once per turn.)

action: Places itself from the player's field on the top of the Deck
Places itself from the player's field on the bottom of the Deck
Reveals itself in the hand for cost
misc: Gain this effect once per turn
